name: Relay Codex Provider
description: Connect ChatGPT accounts to a Relay service as Codex providers. Automatically creates a CODEX provider on the relay and submits the account's codex token.
author: Relay

relay_base_url.title: Relay API Base URL
relay_base_url.description: Base URL of the Relay service (e.g. https://relay.example.com)

relay_api_key.title: Relay API Key
relay_api_key.description: Bearer token for authenticating with the Relay API

default_provider_label.title: Default Provider Label
default_provider_label.description: Default label prefix for created providers
